title: Unrecognized intrinsic function
explanation: This error occurs when you declare an intrinsic function that the compiler does not recognize. Intrinsics are low-level functions provided by the compiler, and they must use exact, known names.

fixes.description: Use the stable std API instead of intrinsics

tip: Intrinsics are internal compiler functions and should rarely be used directly. Prefer the stable std::mem, std::ptr, and std::sync::atomic APIs.
